summary: The Goshen Township Board of Trustees held a special business meeting for personnel matters on March 8, 2021, at 6 PM. The board adopted the agenda, then adjourned to executive session to consider the appointment, employment, and/or compensation of a public employee in accordance with ORC 121. After returning from executive session, a motion was made and approved, though the specific personnel action was not clearly stated in the transcript.
decisions: Motion to adopt the agenda – passed
Motion to adjourn to executive session per ORC 121 to consider appointment, employment, and/or compensation of a public employee – passed
Motion following return from executive session (personnel-related) – passed
notable_topics: Executive session for appointment, employment, and/or compensation of a public employee
notes: Transcript quality is poor with garbled/corrupted text in several places, making some details unclear. The meeting was a brief special session focused solely on personnel matters discussed in executive session.
